# Architecture Recommendation: Cockpit

- Recommended variant: `normalized_event_relay` / `stdout_json_parse_relay::normalized_event_relay`
- Recommended roles: orchestrator, editor
- Recommended role count: `2`
- Strategy mode: `full_hybrid_search`
- Confidence: `medium` (0.77)
- Prior confidence: `high` (0.8)
- Deployability confidence: `medium` (0.77)
- Outcome class: `recommend_with_guardrails`
- Abstain: `False`
